title: The AI Agent Revolution Begins
lines: 72% of enterprises now use or test AI agents.
54% are actively deploying agents across core operations.
Q1 2025 saw only 11% actively using agents.

title: A Trillion-Dollar Market Emerges
lines: AI agent market hits $47.1B projected by 2030.
Global enterprise agentic infrastructure spending reached $12.4B in Q4 2025.
AI agents may mediate $5 trillion in global commerce by 2028.

title: Tech Giants Dominate Infrastructure
lines: Microsoft and AWS control 32% of enterprise AI agent infrastructure.
Microsoft has 345 million Microsoft 365 commercial seats for agent integration.
AWS operates 30+ global regions for large-scale autonomous deployment.

title: Healthcare's 900% ROI Revolution
lines: Healthcare AI delivers 900% ROI on front desk automation.
Hospitals reduce administrative costs by 20-40% with AI agents.
68% of Fortune 500 companies now pilot multi-agent systems.

title: Capabilities Doubling Every 7 Months
lines: METR data shows AI agent capabilities doubling every 7 months.
AI currently handles tasks taking humans roughly 30 minutes.
By 2026, AI agents should handle tasks taking several months.

title: The Autonomous Future Arrives
lines: 84% of organizations plan to increase agent investments in 2026.
Anthropic CEO predicts AI better than almost all humans by 2026-2027.
40% of Global 2000 roles involve direct AI agent engagement by 2028.
